message:
feat(daemon): add CID column for vsock-to-task mapping

Enable proper task identification when multiple VMs are running by
storing the Firecracker vsock Context ID (CID) in the task record.
Previously, resolveTaskID fell back to the first running task.

Changes:
- Add CID field to Task struct
- Add schema migration for existing databases
- Update CRUD queries to handle CID
- Add GetTaskByCID and UpdateTaskCID methods
- Update snapshots.go to use CID-based task lookup
- Add comprehensive tests for CID functionality

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
